name: pyrml
description: pyRML is a Python based engine for processing RML files. The RDF Mapping Language (RML) is a mapping language defined to express customized mapping rules from heterogeneous data structures and serializations to the RDF data model. RML is defined as a superset of the W3C-standardized mapping language R2RML, aiming to extend its applicability and broaden its scope, adding support for data in other structured formats.
